title: Fintastic
description: yet another mod that adds fish and aquarium keeping related items and blocks
body:
A mod focused on aquarium keeping and fish farming, as well as fish genetics and other utilities for all your aquarium-building needs!

When bucketing a fish you can see their common name, and additionally see their scientific name by pressing shift while hovering over the bucket.


For more information on future developments and additional help visit [my Discord server!](https://discord.gg/DCRXtazwSw)

Requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib).

Added support for [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves) and [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments).
